# Mekari Pixel

## What this is

LLM-friendly guidance for **Mekari Pixel3** (Vue 3 + TS). Always output **Vue SFC** using `<script setup lang="ts">`. Prefer **Pixel components (`Mp*`)** over raw HTML. **No Tailwind**.

## Quick start

* Package import:

  ```ts
  import { MpButton, MpInput, MpLabel, MpCard, MpDialog, MpBadge } from "@mekari/pixel3";
  ```
* Minimal:

  ```vue
  <script setup lang="ts">
  import { MpButton } from "@mekari/pixel3";
  </script>

  <template>
    <MpButton variant="primary" size="md">Save</MpButton>
  </template>
  ```

## House rules

1. Use `Mp*` components whenever available (don’t hand‑roll HTML/CSS for common UI).
2. Prefer **props/variants** to custom CSS. Use minimal scoped CSS only if necessary.
3. **A11y**: pair `<MpLabel for>` with `<MpInput id>`, manage focus with `<MpDialog>`, use `aria-*` appropriately.
4. Snippets must be **complete & paste‑ready**.

## HTML → Pixel mapping (common)

* `<button>` → `<MpButton variant="primary">…</MpButton>`
* `<input type="text">` → `<MpInput />` (+ `<MpLabel>` when labeled)
* Card DOM → `<MpCard>` (header/body/footer slots)
* Status → `<MpAlert>` / `<MpBadge>`

## Component: MpButton

Props (typical): `variant: "primary"|"secondary"|"outline"|"ghost"|"link"`, `size: "sm"|"md"|"lg"`.
Icon left example:

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { MpButton } from "@mekari/pixel3";
import { PlusIcon } from "@mekari/pixel3/icons"; // adjust if different
</script>

<template>
  <MpButton variant="primary" size="md">
    <PlusIcon aria-hidden />
    Add item
  </MpButton>
</template>
```

## Component: MpInput + MpLabel

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { MpInput, MpLabel } from "@mekari/pixel3";
</script>

<template>
  <MpLabel for="email">Email</MpLabel>
  <MpInput id="email" type="email" autocomplete="username" />
</template>
```

## Pattern: Login form

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { MpInput, MpLabel, MpButton } from "@mekari/pixel3";
</script>

<template>
  <form @submit.prevent>
    <MpLabel for="email">Email</MpLabel>
    <MpInput id="email" type="email" autocomplete="username" />
    <MpLabel for="password">Password</MpLabel>
    <MpInput id="password" type="password" autocomplete="current-password" />
    <MpButton type="submit" variant="primary">Sign in</MpButton>
  </form>
</template>
```

## Tokens quick

* Prefer tokens (CSS vars/props) over raw hex & magic numbers.
* Primary color: `--color-primary` (update to your real token)
* Radius/spacing/typography: use named tokens.
